<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

The user is asking about an Android client issue: when they click on a node to switch, the latency data on the node doesn't update. They want to know why.

This seems to be related to ClashMetaForAndroid - a proxy/VPN client. The user is saying that when they switch nodes, the latency (delay) displayed on the nodes doesn't get updated.

I need to search the codebase to understand:
1. How node switching works
2. How latency data is displayed and updated
3. Why latency might not update when switching nodes

I will search for relevant code in the Android client.

        "contents": "export const ProxyChain = \n\n [chainConfigData, onUpdateChain]);\n\n  // 定时更新延迟数据\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (!proxies?.records) return;\n\n    const updateDelays = () =\u003e {\n      const currentChain = proxyChainRef.current;\n      if (currentChain.length === 0) return;\n\n      const updatedChain = currentChain.map((item) =\u003e {\n        const proxyRecord = proxies.records[item.name];\n        if (\n          proxyRecord \u0026\u0026\n          proxyRecord.history \u0026\u0026\n          proxyRecord.history.length \u003e 0\n        ) {\n          const latestDelay =\n            proxyRecord.history[proxyRecord.history.length - 1].delay;\n          return { ...item, delay: latestDelay };\n        }\n        return item;\n      });\n\n      // 只有在延迟数据确实发生变化时才更新\n      const hasChanged = updatedChain.some(\n        (item, index) =\u003e item.delay !== currentChain[index]?.delay,\n      );\n\n      if (hasChanged) {\n        onUpdateChainRef.current(updatedChain);\n      }\n    };\n\n    // 立即更新一次延迟\n    updateDelays();\n\n    // 设置定时器，每5秒更新一次延迟\n    const interval = setInterval(updateDelays, 5000);\n\n    return () =\u003e clearInterval(interval);\n  }, [proxies?.records]); // 只依赖proxies.records\n\n  return (\n    \u003cPaper\n      elevation={1}\n;",

        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \nconst handleGroupChange = \n,\n  );\n\n  // 处理代理节点变更\n  const handleProxyChange = useCallback(\n    (event: SelectChangeEvent\u003cstring\u003e) =\u003e {\n      if (isDirectMode) return;\n\n      const newProxy = event.target.value;\n      const currentGroup = state.selection.group;\n      const previousProxy = state.selection.proxy;\n\n      debouncedSetState((prev: ProxyState) =\u003e ({\n        ...prev,\n        selection: {\n          ...prev.selection,\n          proxy: newProxy,\n        },\n        displayProxy: prev.proxyData.records[newProxy] || null,\n      }));\n\n      if (!isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 !isDirectMode) {\n        writeProfileScopedItem(STORAGE_KEY_PROXY, newProxy);\n      }\n\n      const skipConfigSave = isGlobalMode || isDirectMode;\n      handleSelectChange(currentGroup, previousProxy, skipConfigSave)(event);\n    },\n    [\n      isDirectMode,\n      isGlobalMode,\n      state.selection,\n      debouncedSetState,\n      handleSelectChange,\n      writeProfileScopedItem,\n    ],\n  );\n\n  // 导航到代理页面\n  const goToProxies = useCallback(() =\u003e {\n    navigate(\"/proxies\");\n  }, [navigate]);\n\n  // 获取要显示的代理节点\n  const currentProxy = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    return state.displayProxy;\n  }, [state.displayProxy]);\n\n  // 获取当前节点的延迟（增加非空校验）\n  const currentDelay =\n    currentProxy \u0026\u0026 state.selection.group\n      ? delayManager.getDelayFix(currentProxy, state.selection.group)\n      : -1;\n\n  // 信号图标（增加非空校验）\n  const signalInfo =\n    currentProxy \u0026\u0026 state.selection.group\n      ? getSignalIcon(currentDelay)\n      : { icon: \u003cSignalNone /\u003e, text: \"未初始化\", color: \"text.secondary\" };\n\n  const checkCurrentProxyDelay = useCallback\n;\n;",

        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n\n  const checkCurrentProxyDelay = useCallback(async () =\u003e {\n    if (autoCheckInProgressRef.current) return;\n    if (isDirectMode) return;\n\n    const groupName = state.selection.group;\n    const proxyName = state.selection.proxy;\n\n    if (!groupName || !proxyName) return;\n\n    const proxyRecord = latestProxyRecordRef.current;\n    if (!proxyRecord) {\n      debugLog(\n        &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 自动延迟检测跳过，组: ${groupName}, 节点: ${proxyName} 未找到&#96;,\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    autoCheckInProgressRef.current = true;\n\n    const timeout = latestTimeoutRef.current || 10000;\n\n    try {\n      debugLog(\n        &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 自动检测当前节点延迟，组: ${groupName}, 节点: ${proxyName}&#96;,\n      );\n      if (proxyRecord.provider) {\n        await healthcheckProxyProvider(proxyRecord.provider);\n      } else {\n        await delayManager.checkDelay(proxyName, groupName, timeout);\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\n        &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 自动检测当前节点延迟失败，组: ${groupName}, 节点: ${proxyName}&#96;,\n        error,\n      );\n    } finally {\n      autoCheckInProgressRef.current = false;\n      refreshProxy();\n      if (sortType === 1) {\n        setDelaySortRefresh((prev) =\u003e prev + 1);\n      }\n    }\n  }, [\n    isDirectMode,\n    refreshProxy,\n    state.selection.group,\n    state.selection.proxy,\n    sortType,\n    setDelaySortRefresh,\n  ]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isDirectMode) return;\n  }\n\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const ProfilePage = \n\n\n  // 监听后端配置变更\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    let unlistenPromise: Promise\u003c() =\u003e void\u003e | undefined;\n    let lastProfileId: string | null = null;\n    let lastUpdateTime = 0;\n    const debounceDelay = 200;\n\n    let refreshTimer: number | null = null;\n\n    const setupListener = async () =\u003e {\n      unlistenPromise = listen\u003cstring\u003e(\"profile-changed\", (event) =\u003e {\n        const newProfileId = event.payload;\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        debugLog(&#96;[Profile] 收到配置变更事件: ${newProfileId}&#96;);\n\n        if (\n          lastProfileId === newProfileId \u0026\u0026\n          now - lastUpdateTime \u003c debounceDelay\n        ) {\n          debugLog(&#96;[Profile] 重复事件被防抖，跳过&#96;);\n          return;\n        }\n\n        lastProfileId = newProfileId;\n        lastUpdateTime = now;\n\n        debugLog(&#96;[Profile] 执行配置数据刷新&#96;);\n\n        if (refreshTimer !== null) {\n          window.clearTimeout(refreshTimer);\n        }\n\n        // 使用异步调度避免阻塞事件处理\n        refreshTimer = window.setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n          mutateProfiles().catch((error) =\u003e {\n            console.error(\"[Profile] 配置数据刷新失败:\", error);\n          });\n          refreshTimer = null;\n        }, 0);\n      });\n    };\n\n    setupListener();\n\n    return () =\u003e {\n      if (refreshTimer !== null) {\n        window.clearTimeout(refreshTimer);\n      }\n      unlistenPromise?.then((unlisten) =\u003e unlisten()).catch(console.error);\n    };\n  }, [mutateProfiles]);\n\n  // 组件卸载时清理中断控制器\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    return () =\u003e {\n      if (abortControllerRef.current) {\n        abortControllerRef.current.abort();\n        debugProfileSwitch(\"COMPONENT_UNMOUNT_CLEANUP\", \"all\");\n      }\n    };\n  }, []);\n\n  return (\n    \u003cBasePage\n      full\n      title={t(\"profiles.page.title\")}\n;",

        "contents": "export const useCloseAllWithDelayCheck = \nconst handleCloseAllWithDelayCheck = async () =\u003e {\n\");\n\n      // 自动切换到每个组第一个连接成功的节点（只处理 URLTest 和 Fallback，不处理 Selector）\n      for (const group of groups) {\n        if (!group.all || group.all.length === 0) continue;\n        if (![\"URLTest\", \"Fallback\"].includes(group.type)) continue;\n\n        // 按照组中节点的原始顺序（group.all）查找第一个连接成功的节点\n        // 这样可以确保选择的是排序最靠前的成功节点\n        let firstSuccessProxy: string | null = null;\n        \n        for (const proxy of group.all) {\n          const proxyName = typeof proxy === \"string\" ? proxy : proxy.name;\n          if (!proxyName) continue;\n          \n          // 跳过 DIRECT、REJECT 和 provider 节点\n          if (proxyName === \"DIRECT\" || proxyName === \"REJECT\") continue;\n          const proxyRecord = proxiesData.records?.[proxyName];\n          if (proxyRecord?.provider) continue;\n          \n          // 检查该节点是否连接成功\n          const delayUpdate = delayManager.getDelayUpdate(proxyName, group.name);\n          if (delayUpdate) {\n            const delay = delayUpdate.delay;\n            const delayText = delayManager.formatDelay(delay, timeout);\n            \n            // 判断是否连接成功：不是T、E、-、testing，且delay \u003e 0\n            if (\n              delayText !== \"T\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"E\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"-\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"testing\" \u0026\u0026\n              delay \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026\n              delay \u003c timeout \u0026\u0026\n              delay \u003c= 1e5\n            ) {\n              // 找到第一个连接成功的节点（按原始顺序）\n              firstSuccessProxy = proxyName;\n              debugLog(\n                &#96;[CloseAll] Found first success proxy for group ${group.name}: ${proxyName} (delay: ${delay}ms)&#96;,\n              );\n              break;\n            }\n          }\n        }\n\n        // 如果找到连接成功的节点，且当前节点不是它，则切换\n  };\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "// 代理选择 Hook\nexport const useProxySelection = (options: ProxySelectionOptions = {}) =\u003e {\n  const { current, patchCurrent } = useProfiles();\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n\n  const { onSuccess, onError, enableConnectionCleanup = true } = options;\n\n  // 缓存\n  const config = useMemo(\n    () =\u003e ({\n      autoCloseConnection: verge?.auto_close_connection ?? false,\n      enableConnectionCleanup,\n    }),\n    [verge?.auto_close_connection, enableConnectionCleanup],\n  );\n\n  // 切换节点\n  const changeProxy = useLockFn(\n    async (\n      groupName: string,\n      proxyName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e {\n      debugLog(&#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;);\n\n      try {\n        if (current \u0026\u0026 !skipConfigSave) {\n          const selected = current.selected ? [...current.selected] : [];\n          const index = selected.findIndex((item) =\u003e item.name === groupName);\n\n          if (index \u003c 0) {\n            selected.push({ name: groupName, now: proxyName });\n          } else {\n            selected[index] = { name: groupName, now: proxyName };\n          }\n          await patchCurrent({ selected });\n        }\n\n        await selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName);\n        await syncTrayProxySelection();\n        debugLog(\n          &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理和状态同步完成: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n        );\n\n        onSuccess?.();\n\n        if (\n          config.enableConnectionCleanup \u0026\u0026\n          config.autoCloseConnection \u0026\u0026\n          previousProxy\n        ) {\n          setTimeout(() =\u003e cleanupConnections(previousProxy), 0);\n        }\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\n          &#96;\n\n    }\n;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const CACHE_TTL = 30 * 60 * 1000;\n\nclass DelayManager {\n  private cache = new Map\u003cstring, DelayUpdate\u003e();\n  private urlMap = new Map\u003cstring, string\u003e();\n\n  // 每个节点的监听\n  private listenerMap = new Map\u003cstring, (update: DelayUpdate) =\u003e void\u003e();\n\n  // 每个分组的监听\n  private groupListenerMap = new Map\u003cstring, () =\u003e void\u003e();\n\n  private pendingItemUpdates = new Map\u003cstring, DelayUpdate[]\u003e();\n  private pendingGroupUpdates = new Set\u003cstring\u003e();\n  private itemFlushScheduled = false;\n  private groupFlushScheduled = false;\n\n  private scheduleItemFlush() {\n    if (this.itemFlushScheduled) return;\n    this.itemFlushScheduled = true;\n\n    const run = () =\u003e {\n      this.itemFlushScheduled = false;\n      const updates = this.pendingItemUpdates;\n      this.pendingItemUpdates = new Map();\n\n      updates.forEach((queue, key) =\u003e {\n        const listener = this.listenerMap.get(key);\n        if (!listener) return;\n\n        queue.forEach((update) =\u003e {\n          try {\n            listener(update);\n          } catch (error) {\n            console.error(\n              &#96;[DelayManager] 通知节点延迟监听器失败: ${key}&#96;,\n              error,\n            );\n          }\n        });\n      });\n    };\n\n    if (typeof window !== \"undefined\") {\n      if (typeof window.requestAnimationFrame === \"function\") {\n        window.requestAnimationFrame(run);\n        return;\n      }\n      if (typeof window.setTimeout === \"function\") {\n        window.setTimeout(run, 0);\n        return;\n      }\n    }\n\n    Promise.resolve().then(run);\n  }\n\n  private scheduleGroupFlush() {\n    if (this.groupFlushScheduled) return;\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyGroups = \n\n\n  // 处理代理组选择菜单\n  const handleGroupMenuOpen = (event: React.MouseEvent\u003cHTMLElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n    setRuleMenuAnchor(event.currentTarget);\n  };\n\n  const handleGroupMenuClose = () =\u003e {\n    setRuleMenuAnchor(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleGroupSelect = (groupName: string) =\u003e {\n    setSelectedGroup(groupName);\n    handleGroupMenuClose();\n\n    if (isChainMode \u0026\u0026 mode === \"rule\") {\n      updateProxyChainConfigInRuntime(null);\n      localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-group\");\n      localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-exit-node\");\n      localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-items\");\n      setProxyChain([]);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleChangeProxy = useCallback(\n    (group: IProxyGroupItem, proxy: IProxyItem) =\u003e {\n      if (isChainMode) {\n        // 使用函数式更新来避免状态延迟问题\n        setProxyChain((prev) =\u003e {\n          // 检查是否已经存在相同名称的代理，防止重复添加\n          if (prev.some((item) =\u003e item.name === proxy.name)) {\n            const warningMessage = t(\"proxies.page.chain.duplicateNode\");\n            setDuplicateWarning({\n              open: true,\n              message: warningMessage,\n            });\n            return prev; // 返回原来的状态，不做任何更改\n          }\n\n          // 安全获取延迟数据，如果没有延迟数据则设为 undefined\n          const delay =\n            proxy.history \u0026\u0026 proxy.history.length \u003e 0\n              ? proxy.history[proxy.history.length - 1].delay\n              : undefined;\n\n          const chainItem: ProxyChainItem = {\n            id: &#96;${proxy.name}_${Date.now()}&#96;,\n            name: proxy.name,\n            type: proxy.type,\n            delay: delay,\n          };\n\n          return [...prev, chainItem];\n        });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (![\"Selector\", \"URLTest\", \"Fallback\"].includes(group.type)) return;\n\n      handleProxyGroupChange(group, proxy);\n    },\n    [handleProxyGroupChange, isChainMode, t],\n  );\n;",

        "contents": "export default function useFilterSort(\n  proxies: IProxyItem[],\n  groupName: string,\n  filterText: string,\n  sortType: ProxySortType,\n  searchState?: ProxySearchState,\n) {\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n  const [_, bumpRefresh] = useReducer((count: number) =\u003e count + 1, 0);\n  const lastInputRef = useRef\u003c{ text: string; sort: ProxySortType } | null\u003e(\n    null,\n  );\n  const debounceTimerRef = useRef\u003cnumber | null\u003e(null);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    let last = 0;\n\n    delayManager.setGroupListener(groupName, () =\u003e {\n      // 简单节流\n      const now = Date.now();\n      if (now - last \u003e 666) {\n        last = now;\n        bumpRefresh();\n      }\n    });\n\n    return () =\u003e {\n      delayManager.removeGroupListener(groupName);\n    };\n  }, [groupName]);\n\n  const compute = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    const fp = filterProxies(proxies, groupName, filterText, searchState);\n    const sp = sortProxies(\n      fp,\n      groupName,\n      sortType,\n      verge?.default_latency_timeout,\n    );\n    return sp;\n  }, [\n    proxies,\n    groupName,\n    filterText,\n    sortType,\n    searchState,\n    verge?.default_latency_timeout,\n  ]);\n\n  const [result, setResult] = useReducer(\n    (_prev: IProxyItem[], next: IProxyItem[]) =\u003e next,\n    compute,\n  );\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (debounceTimerRef.current !== null)\n  }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const ProfilePage = \nconst activateProfile = \nasync (profile: string, notifySuccess: boolean) =\u003e {\n(prev) =\u003e {\n\n        return [...prev, profile];\n      });\n\n      try {\n        debugLog(\n          &#96;[Profile] 开始切换到: ${profile}，序列号: ${currentSequence}&#96;,\n        );\n\n        // 检查请求有效性\n        if (\n          isRequestOutdated(currentSequence, requestSequenceRef, profile) ||\n          isOperationAborted(currentAbortController, profile)\n        ) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        // 执行切换请求\n        const requestPromise = patchProfiles(\n          { current: profile },\n          currentAbortController.signal,\n        );\n        pendingRequestRef.current = requestPromise;\n\n        const success = await requestPromise;\n\n        if (pendingRequestRef.current === requestPromise) {\n          pendingRequestRef.current = null;\n        }\n\n        // 再次检查有效性\n        if (\n          isRequestOutdated(currentSequence, requestSequenceRef, profile) ||\n          isOperationAborted(currentAbortController, profile)\n        ) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        // 完成切换\n        await mutateLogs();\n        closeAllConnections();\n\n        if (notifySuccess \u0026\u0026 success) {\n          showNotice.success(\n            \"profiles.page.feedback.notifications.profileSwitched\",\n            1000,\n          );\n        }\n\n        debugLog(\n          &#96;[Profile] 切换到 ${profile} 完成，序列号: ${currentSequence}，开始后台处理&#96;,\n        );\n\n        // 延迟执行后台任务\n        setTimeout(\n          () =\u003e\n            executeBackgroundTasks(\n              profile,\n              currentSequence,\n              currentAbortController,\n            ),\n          50,\n        );\n      } catch (err: any) {\n        if (pendingRequestRef.current) {\n          pendingRequestRef.current = null;\n        }\n    }\n;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n\n  // 延迟测试\n  const handleCheckDelay = useLockFn(async () =\u003e {\n    const groupName = state.selection.group;\n    if (!groupName || isDirectMode) return;\n\n    debugLog(&#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 开始测试所有延迟，组: ${groupName}&#96;);\n\n    const timeout = verge?.default_latency_timeout || 10000;\n\n    // 获取当前组的所有代理\n    const proxyNames: string[] = [];\n    const providers: Set\u003cstring\u003e = new Set();\n\n    if (isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 proxies?.global) {\n      // 全局模式\n      const allProxies = proxies.global.all\n        .filter((p: any) =\u003e {\n          const name = typeof p === \"string\" ? p : p.name;\n          return name !== \"DIRECT\" \u0026\u0026 name !== \"REJECT\";\n        })\n        .map((p: any) =\u003e (typeof p === \"string\" ? p : p.name));\n\n      allProxies.forEach((name: string) =\u003e {\n        const proxy = state.proxyData.records[name];\n        if (proxy?.provider) {\n          providers.add(proxy.provider);\n        } else {\n          proxyNames.push(name);\n        }\n      });\n    } else {\n      // 规则模式\n      const group = state.proxyData.groups.find((g) =\u003e g.name === groupName);\n      if (group) {\n        group.all.forEach((name: string) =\u003e {\n          const proxy = state.proxyData.records[name];\n          if (proxy?.provider) {\n            providers.add(proxy.provider);\n          } else {\n            proxyNames.push(name);\n          }\n        });\n      }\n    }\n\n    debugLog(\n      &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 找到代理数量: ${proxyNames.length}, 提供者数量: ${providers.size}&#96;,\n    );\n\n    // 测试提供者的节点\n    if (providers.size \u003e 0) {\n      debugLog(&#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 开始测试提供者节点&#96;);\n      await Promise.allSettled(\n        [...providers].map((p) =\u003e healthcheckProxyProvider(p)),\n      );\n    }\n\n    // 测试非提供者的节点\n    if (proxyNames.length \u003e 0)\n  };\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const useCloseAllWithDelayCheck = \nconst handleCloseAllWithDelayCheck = async () =\u003e {\n\n          }\n        }\n\n        // 如果找到连接成功的节点，且当前节点不是它，则切换\n        if (firstSuccessProxy) {\n          const currentProxy = group.now;\n          if (currentProxy !== firstSuccessProxy) {\n            try {\n              debugLog(\n                &#96;[CloseAll] Auto-switching group ${group.name}: ${currentProxy || \"none\"} -\u003e ${firstSuccessProxy}&#96;,\n              );\n              await selectNodeForGroup(group.name, firstSuccessProxy);\n              debugLog(&#96;[CloseAll] Successfully switched group ${group.name} to ${firstSuccessProxy}&#96;);\n            } catch (error) {\n              console.error(\n                &#96;[CloseAll] Failed to switch group ${group.name} to ${firstSuccessProxy}:&#96;,\n                error,\n              );\n            }\n          } else {\n            debugLog(\n              &#96;[CloseAll] Group ${group.name} already using first success proxy: ${firstSuccessProxy}&#96;,\n            );\n          }\n        } else {\n          debugLog(&#96;[CloseAll] No success proxy found for group ${group.name}, skipping switch&#96;);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Close all connections except those using DIRECT\n      await closeConnectionsExcludingDirect();\n      \n      // 发送完成通知\n      try {\n        await invoke(\"notify_close_all_completed\");\n        debugLog(\"[CloseAll] Notification sent successfully\");\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"[CloseAll] Failed to send notification:\", error);\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"[CloseAll] Error during close all connections:\", error);\n    }\n    // 注意：不需要重置关闭连接状态，因为使用基于时间的冷却期（10秒）\n  }, [proxiesData, verge?.default_latency_timeout]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    let unlisten: (() =\u003e void) | undefined;\n  }\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const useFallbackSwitchNotify = \n() =\u003e {\n\n    \n    for (const [groupName, currentNow] of currentGroups) {\n      const previousNow = previousGroups.get(groupName);\n      \n      // 检测到节点切换\n      if (previousNow \u0026\u0026 previousNow !== currentNow) {\n        debugLog(\n          &#96;[FallbackNotify] Detected switch in group ${groupName}: ${previousNow} -\u003e ${currentNow}&#96;\n        );\n        \n        // 检查是否在冷却期内\n        const cooldownStatus = isInNotifyCooldown();\n        if (cooldownStatus.inCooldown) {\n          debugLog(\n            &#96;[FallbackNotify] Skipping notification (${cooldownStatus.reason}, ${cooldownStatus.elapsed}ms elapsed)&#96;\n          );\n        } else {\n          // 发送 fallback 切换通知\n          invoke(\"notify_fallback_proxy_switched\", {\n            group: groupName,\n            from: previousNow,\n            to: currentNow,\n          })\n            .then(() =\u003e {\n              debugLog(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Notification sent for group ${groupName}&#96;);\n            })\n            .catch((error) =\u003e {\n              console.error(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Failed to send notification:&#96;, error);\n            });\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 更新保存的状态\n    previousGroupsRef.current = currentGroups;\n  }, [proxiesData?.groups]);\n};",

        "contents": "export const ProxyItem = \n() =\u003e {\n\n  }, [proxy.name, group.name, isPreset]);\n\n  const updateDelay = useCallback(() =\u003e {\n    if (!proxy) return;\n    const cachedUpdate = delayManager.getDelayUpdate(proxy.name, group.name);\n    if (cachedUpdate) {\n      setDelayState({ ...cachedUpdate });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const fallbackDelay = delayManager.getDelayFix(proxy, group.name);\n    if (fallbackDelay === -1) {\n      setDelayState({ delay: -1, updatedAt: 0 });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    let updatedAt = 0;\n    const history = proxy.history;\n    if (history \u0026\u0026 history.length \u003e 0) {\n      const lastRecord = history[history.length - 1];\n      const parsed = Date.parse(lastRecord.time);\n      if (!Number.isNaN(parsed)) {\n        updatedAt = parsed;\n      }\n    }\n\n    setDelayState({\n      delay: fallbackDelay,\n      updatedAt,\n    });\n  }, [proxy, group.name]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    updateDelay();\n  }, [updateDelay]);\n\n  const onDelay = useLockFn(async () =\u003e {\n    setDelayState({ delay: -2, updatedAt: Date.now() });\n    setDelayState(\n      await delayManager.checkDelay(proxy.name, group.name, timeout),\n    );\n  });\n\n  const delayValue = delayState.delay;\n\n  return\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const ProfilePage = \nconst activateProfile = \nasync (profile: string, notifySuccess: boolean) =\u003e {\n catch (err: any) {\n        if (pendingRequestRef.current) {\n          pendingRequestRef.current = null;\n        }\n\n        // 检查是否因为中断或过期而出错\n        if (\n          isOperationAborted(currentAbortController, profile) ||\n          isRequestOutdated(currentSequence, requestSequenceRef, profile)\n        ) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        console.error(&#96;[Profile] 切换失败:&#96;, err);\n        showNotice.error(err, 4000);\n      } finally {\n        // 只有当前profile仍然是正在切换的profile且序列号匹配时才清理状态\n        if (\n          switchingProfileRef.current === profile \u0026\u0026\n          currentSequence === requestSequenceRef.current\n        ) {\n          cleanupSwitchState(profile, currentSequence);\n        } else {\n          debugProfileSwitch(\n            \"CLEANUP_SKIPPED\",\n            profile,\n            &#96;序列号不匹配或已被接管: ${currentSequence} vs ${requestSequenceRef.current}&#96;,\n          );\n        }\n      }\n    },\n    [\n      profiles,\n      patchProfiles,\n      mutateLogs,\n      executeBackgroundTasks,\n      handleProfileInterrupt,\n      cleanupSwitchState,\n    ],\n  );\n  const onSelect = async (current: string, force: boolean) =\u003e {\n    // 阻止重复点击或已激活的profile\n    if (switchingProfileRef.current === current) {\n      debugProfileSwitch(\"DUPLICATE_CLICK_IGNORED\", current);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (!force \u0026\u0026 current === profiles.current) {\n      debugProfileSwitch(\"ALREADY_CURRENT_IGNORED\", current);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    await activateProfile(current, true);\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    (async () =\u003e {\n      if (current) {\n        mutateProfiles();\n        await activateProfile(current, false);\n      }\n    })();\n  }, [current, activateProfile, mutateProfiles]);\n\n  const onEnhance = useLockFn(async (notifySuccess: boolean) =\u003e {\n    if\n  };\n;",

     if (isDirectMode) {\n        newGroup = \"DIRECT\";\n        newProxy = \"DIRECT\";\n        newDisplayProxy = proxies.records?.DIRECT || { name: \"DIRECT\" };\n      } else if (isGlobalMode       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import useSWR, { mutate } from \"swr\";\nimport { selectNodeForGroup } from \"tauri-plugin-mihomo-api\";\n\nimport {\n  getProfiles,\n  patchProfile,\n  patchProfilesConfig,\n} from \"@/services/cmds\";\nimport { calcuProxies } from \"@/services/cmds\";\nimport { debugLog } from \"@/utils/debug\";\n\nexport const useProfiles = () =\u003e {\n  const {\n    data: profiles,\n    mutate: mutateProfiles,\n    error,\n    isValidating,\n  } = useSWR(\"getProfiles\", getProfiles, {\n    revalidateOnFocus: false,\n    revalidateOnReconnect: false,\n    dedupingInterval: 500, // 减少去重时间，提高响应性\n    errorRetryCount: 3,\n    errorRetryInterval: 1000,\n    refreshInterval: 0, // 完全由手动控制\n    onError: (error) =\u003e {\n      console.error(\"[useProfiles] SWR错误:\", error);\n    },\n    onSuccess: (data) =\u003e {\n      debugLog(\n        \"[useProfiles] 配置数据更新成功，配置数量:\",\n        data?.items?.length || 0,\n      );\n    },\n  });\n\n  const patchProfiles = async (\n    value: Partial\u003cIProfilesConfig\u003e,\n    signal?: AbortSignal,\n  ) =\u003e {\n    try {\n      if (signal?.aborted) {\n        throw new DOMException(\"Operation was aborted\", \"AbortError\");\n      }\n      const success = await patchProfilesConfig(value);\n\n      if (signal?.aborted) {\n        throw new DOMException(\"Operation was aborted\", \"AbortError\");\n      }\n\n      await mutateProfiles();\n\n      return success;\n    } catch (error) {\n      if (error instanceof DOMException \u0026\u0026 error.name === \"AbortError\") {\n        throw error;\n      }\n\n      await mutateProfiles();\n      throw error;\n    }\n  };\n\n  const patchCurrent = async (value: Partial\u003cIProfileItem\u003e) =\u003e {\n    if (profiles?.current) {\n      await patchProfile(profiles.current, value);\n      if (!value.selected) {\n        mutateProfiles();\n      }\n    }\n  };\n\n  // 根据selected的节点选择\n  const activateSelected = async () =\u003e\n;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyGroups = \n\n\n  const getGroupHeadState = useCallback(\n    (groupName: string) =\u003e {\n      const headItem = renderList.find(\n        (item) =\u003e item.type === 1 \u0026\u0026 item.group?.name === groupName,\n      );\n      return headItem?.headState;\n    },\n    [renderList],\n  );\n\n  // 统代理选择\n  const { handleProxyGroupChange } = useProxySelection({\n    onSuccess: () =\u003e {\n      onProxies();\n    },\n    onError: (error) =\u003e {\n      console.error(\"代理切换失败\", error);\n      onProxies();\n    },\n  });\n\n  const timeout = verge?.default_latency_timeout || 10000;\n\n  const virtuosoRef = useRef\u003cVirtuosoHandle\u003e(null);\n  const scrollPositionRef = useRef\u003cRecord\u003cstring, number\u003e\u003e({});\n  const [showScrollTop, setShowScrollTop] = useState(false);\n  const scrollerRef = useRef\u003cElement | null\u003e(null);\n\n  // 从 localStorage 恢复滚动位置\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (renderList.length === 0) return;\n\n    let restoreTimer: ReturnType\u003ctypeof setTimeout\u003e | null = null;\n\n    try {\n      const savedPositions = localStorage.getItem(\"proxy-scroll-positions\");\n      if (savedPositions) {\n        const positions = JSON.parse(savedPositions);\n        scrollPositionRef.current = positions;\n        const savedPosition = positions[mode];\n\n        if (savedPosition !== undefined) {\n          restoreTimer = setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n            virtuosoRef.current?.scrollTo({\n              top: savedPosition,\n              behavior: \"auto\",\n            });\n          }, 100);\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      console.error(\"Error restoring scroll position:\", e);\n    }\n\n    return () =\u003e {\n      if (restoreTimer) {\n        clearTimeout(restoreTimer);\n      }\n    };\n  }, [mode, renderList.length]);\n\n  // 改为使用节流函数保存滚动位置\n  const saveScrollPosition = useCallback\n;\n;",

        "contents": "export const useRenderList = \nconst renderList: IRenderItem[] = () =\u003e {\n\n        return [];\n      }\n\n      // 如果没有选择特定组，显示第一个组的节点（如果有组的话）\n      if (allGroups.length \u003e 0) {\n        const firstGroup = allGroups[0];\n        const proxies = filterSort(\n          firstGroup.all,\n          firstGroup.name,\n          \"\",\n          0,\n          latencyTimeout,\n        );\n\n        if (col \u003e 1) {\n          return groupProxies(proxies, col).map((proxyCol, colIndex) =\u003e ({\n            type: 4,\n            key: &#96;chain-col-first-${colIndex}&#96;,\n            group: firstGroup,\n            headState: DEFAULT_STATE,\n            col,\n            proxyCol,\n            provider: proxyCol[0]?.provider,\n          }));\n        } else {\n          return proxies.map((proxy) =\u003e ({\n            type: 2,\n            key: &#96;chain-first-${proxy!.name}&#96;,\n            group: firstGroup,\n            proxy,\n            headState: DEFAULT_STATE,\n            provider: proxy.provider,\n          }));\n        }\n      }\n\n      // 如果没有组，显示所有节点\n      const allProxies: IProxyItem[] = allGroups.flatMap(\n        (group: any) =\u003e group.all,\n      );\n\n      // 为每个节点获取延迟信息\n      const proxiesWithDelay = allProxies.map((proxy) =\u003e {\n        const delay = delayManager.getDelay(proxy.name, \"chain-mode\");\n        return {\n          ...proxy,\n          // 如果delayManager有延迟数据，更新history\n          history:\n            delay \u003e= 0\n              ? [{ time: new Date().toISOString(), delay }]\n              : proxy.history || [],\n        };\n      });\n\n      // 创建一个虚拟的组来容纳所有节点\n      const virtualGroup: ProxyGroup = {\n        name: \"All Proxies\",\n        type: \"Selector\",\n        udp: false,\n        xudp: false,\n        tfo: false,\n        mptcp: false,\n        smux: false,\n        history: [],\n        now: \"\",\n        all: proxiesWithDelay,\n      };\n\n      if (col \u003e 1)\n  }\n;\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "// 多列布局\nexport const ProxyItemMini = (props: Props) =\u003e {\n  const { group, proxy, selected, showType = true, onClick } = props;\n\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n\n  const presetList = [\"DIRECT\", \"REJECT\", \"REJECT-DROP\", \"PASS\", \"COMPATIBLE\"];\n  const isPreset = presetList.includes(proxy.name);\n  // -1/\u003c=0 为不显示，-2 为 loading\n  const [delayState, setDelayState] = useReducer(\n    (_: DelayUpdate, next: DelayUpdate) =\u003e next,\n    { delay: -1, updatedAt: 0 },\n  );\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n  const timeout = verge?.default_latency_timeout || 10000;\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isPreset) return;\n    delayManager.setListener(proxy.name, group.name, setDelayState);\n\n    return () =\u003e {\n      delayManager.removeListener(proxy.name, group.name);\n    };\n  }, [isPreset, proxy.name, group.name]);\n\n  const updateDelay = useCallback(() =\u003e {\n    if (!proxy) return;\n    const cachedUpdate = delayManager.getDelayUpdate(proxy.name, group.name);\n    if (cachedUpdate) {\n      setDelayState({ ...cachedUpdate });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const fallbackDelay = delayManager.getDelayFix(proxy, group.name);\n    if (fallbackDelay === -1) {\n      setDelayState({ delay: -1, updatedAt: 0 });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    let updatedAt = 0;\n    const history = proxy.history;\n    if (history \u0026\u0026 history.length \u003e 0) {\n      const lastRecord = history[history.length - 1];\n      const parsed = Date.parse(lastRecord.time);\n      if (!Number.isNaN(parsed)) {\n        updatedAt = parsed;\n      }\n    }\n\n    setDelayState({\n      delay: fallbackDelay,\n      updatedAt,\n    });\n  }, [proxy, group.name]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    updateDelay();\n  }, [updateDelay]);\n\n  const onDelay = useLockFn(async () =\u003e {\n    setDelayState({ delay: -2, updatedAt: Date.now() });\n    setDelayState(\n      await delayManager.checkDelay(proxy.name, group.name, timeout),\n    );\n  });\n\n  const delayValue = delayState.delay;\n\n  return\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "// 多列布局"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "export const ProxyItemMini = (props: Props) =\u003e {"
          },

            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "  const { group, proxy, selected, showType = true, onClick } = props;"

            "text": "  const { t } = useTranslation();"

            "lineNumber": 24

        "contents": "    fun update(snap: Boolean): Boolean {\n        val frameTime = System.currentTimeMillis()\n        var invalidate = false\n\n        if (proxy.type.group) {\n            title = proxy.name\n\n            if (link == null) {\n                subtitle = proxy.type.name\n            } else {\n                if (linkNow !== link.now) {\n                    linkNow = link.now\n\n                    subtitle = \"%s(%s)\".format(\n                        proxy.type.name,\n                        link.now.ifEmpty { \"*\" }\n                    )\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            title = proxy.title\n            subtitle = proxy.subtitle\n        }\n\n        if (delay != proxy.delay) {\n            delay = proxy.delay\n            delayText = if (proxy.delay in 0..Short.MAX_VALUE) proxy.delay.toString() else \"\"\n        }\n\n        if (parentNow !== parent.now) {\n            parentNow = parent.now\n            selected = proxy.name == parent.now\n        }\n\n        controls = if (selected) config.selectedControl else config.unselectedControl\n\n        if (snap) {\n            background = if (selected) config.selectedBackground else config.unselectedBackground\n        } else {\n            val target = if (selected) config.selectedBackground else config.unselectedBackground",

        "contents": "export const useRenderList = \n\n [proxiesData, mode, refreshProxy]);\n\n  // 链式代理模式节点自动计算延迟\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (!isChainMode || !runtimeConfig) return;\n\n    const allProxies: IProxyItem[] = Object.values(\n      (runtimeConfig as any).proxies || {},\n    );\n    if (allProxies.length === 0) return;\n\n    // 设置组监听器，当有延迟更新时自动刷新\n    const groupListener = () =\u003e {\n      debugLog(\"[ChainMode] 延迟更新，刷新UI\");\n      refreshProxy();\n    };\n\n    delayManager.setGroupListener(\"chain-mode\", groupListener);\n\n    const calculateDelays = async () =\u003e {\n      try {\n        const timeout = verge?.default_latency_timeout || 10000;\n        const proxyNames = allProxies.map((proxy) =\u003e proxy.name);\n\n        debugLog(&#96;[ChainMode] 开始计算 ${proxyNames.length} 个节点的延迟&#96;);\n\n        // 使用 delayManager 计算延迟，每个节点计算完成后会自动触发监听器刷新界面\n        delayManager.checkListDelay(proxyNames, \"chain-mode\", timeout);\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"Failed to calculate delays for chain mode:\", error);\n      }\n    };\n\n    // 延迟执行避免阻塞\n    const handle = setTimeout(calculateDelays, 100);\n\n    return () =\u003e {\n      clearTimeout(handle);\n      // 清理组监听器\n      delayManager.removeGroupListener(\"chain-mode\");\n    };\n  }, [\n    isChainMode,\n    runtimeConfig,\n    verge?.default_latency_timeout,\n    refreshProxy,\n  ]);\n\n  // 处理渲染列表\n  const renderList: IRenderItem[] = useMemo\n;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n\n  const checkCurrentProxyDelay = useCallback(async () =\u003e {\n    if (autoCheckInProgressRef.current) return;\n    if (isDirectMode) return;\n\n    const groupName = state.selection.group;\n    const proxyName = state.selection.proxy;\n\n    if (!groupName || !proxyName) return;\n\n    const proxyRecord = latestProxyRecordRef.current;\n    if (!proxyRecord) {\n      debugLog(\n        &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 自动延迟检测跳过，组: ${groupName}, 节点: ${proxyName} 未找到&#96;,\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    autoCheckInProgressRef.current = true;\n\n    const timeout = latestTimeoutRef.current || 10000;\n\n    try {\n      debugLog(\n        &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 自动检测当前节点延迟，组: ${groupName}, 节点: ${proxyName}&#96;,\n      );\n      if (proxyRecord.provider) {\n        await healthcheckProxyProvider(proxyRecord.provider);\n      } else {\n        await delayManager.checkDelay(proxyName, groupName, timeout);\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\n        &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 自动检测当前节点延迟失败，组: ${groupName}, 节点: ${proxyName}&#96;,\n        error,\n      );\n    } finally {\n      autoCheckInProgressRef.current = false;\n      refreshProxy();\n      if (sortType === 1) {\n        setDelaySortRefresh((prev) =\u003e prev + 1);\n      }\n    }\n  }, [\n    isDirectMode,\n    refreshProxy,\n    state.selection.group,\n    state.selection.proxy,\n    sortType,\n    setDelaySortRefresh,\n  ]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isDirectMode) return;\n  }\n\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const useCloseAllWithDelayCheck = \nconst handleCloseAllWithDelayCheck = async () =\u003e {\n\");\n\n      // 自动切换到每个组第一个连接成功的节点（只处理 URLTest 和 Fallback，不处理 Selector）\n      for (const group of groups) {\n        if (!group.all || group.all.length === 0) continue;\n        if (![\"URLTest\", \"Fallback\"].includes(group.type)) continue;\n\n        // 按照组中节点的原始顺序（group.all）查找第一个连接成功的节点\n        // 这样可以确保选择的是排序最靠前的成功节点\n        let firstSuccessProxy: string | null = null;\n        \n        for (const proxy of group.all) {\n          const proxyName = typeof proxy === \"string\" ? proxy : proxy.name;\n          if (!proxyName) continue;\n          \n          // 跳过 DIRECT、REJECT 和 provider 节点\n          if (proxyName === \"DIRECT\" || proxyName === \"REJECT\") continue;\n          const proxyRecord = proxiesData.records?.[proxyName];\n          if (proxyRecord?.provider) continue;\n          \n          // 检查该节点是否连接成功\n          const delayUpdate = delayManager.getDelayUpdate(proxyName, group.name);\n          if (delayUpdate) {\n            const delay = delayUpdate.delay;\n            const delayText = delayManager.formatDelay(delay, timeout);\n            \n            // 判断是否连接成功：不是T、E、-、testing，且delay \u003e 0\n            if (\n              delayText !== \"T\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"E\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"-\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"testing\" \u0026\u0026\n              delay \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026\n              delay \u003c timeout \u0026\u0026\n              delay \u003c= 1e5\n            ) {\n              // 找到第一个连接成功的节点（按原始顺序）\n              firstSuccessProxy = proxyName;\n              debugLog(\n                &#96;[CloseAll] Found first success proxy for group ${group.name}: ${proxyName} (delay: ${delay}ms)&#96;,\n              );\n              break;\n            }\n          }\n        }\n\n        // 如果找到连接成功的节点，且当前节点不是它，则切换\n  };\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const useCloseAllWithDelayCheck = \nconst handleCloseAllWithDelayCheck = async () =\u003e {\n\n          }\n        }\n\n        // 如果找到连接成功的节点，且当前节点不是它，则切换\n        if (firstSuccessProxy) {\n          const currentProxy = group.now;\n          if (currentProxy !== firstSuccessProxy) {\n            try {\n              debugLog(\n                &#96;[CloseAll] Auto-switching group ${group.name}: ${currentProxy || \"none\"} -\u003e ${firstSuccessProxy}&#96;,\n              );\n              await selectNodeForGroup(group.name, firstSuccessProxy);\n              debugLog(&#96;[CloseAll] Successfully switched group ${group.name} to ${firstSuccessProxy}&#96;);\n            } catch (error) {\n              console.error(\n                &#96;[CloseAll] Failed to switch group ${group.name} to ${firstSuccessProxy}:&#96;,\n                error,\n              );\n            }\n          } else {\n            debugLog(\n              &#96;[CloseAll] Group ${group.name} already using first success proxy: ${firstSuccessProxy}&#96;,\n            );\n          }\n        } else {\n          debugLog(&#96;[CloseAll] No success proxy found for group ${group.name}, skipping switch&#96;);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Close all connections except those using DIRECT\n      await closeConnectionsExcludingDirect();\n      \n      // 发送完成通知\n      try {\n        await invoke(\"notify_close_all_completed\");\n        debugLog(\"[CloseAll] Notification sent successfully\");\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"[CloseAll] Failed to send notification:\", error);\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"[CloseAll] Error during close all connections:\", error);\n    }\n    // 注意：不需要重置关闭连接状态，因为使用基于时间的冷却期（10秒）\n  }, [proxiesData, verge?.default_latency_timeout]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    let unlisten: (() =\u003e void) | undefined;\n  }\n;",

            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "                &#96;[CloseAll] Auto-switching group ${group.name}: ${currentProxy || \"none\"} -\u003e ${firstSuccessProxy}&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "              );"
          },
          {

            "text": "              debugLog(&#96;[CloseAll] Successfully switched group ${group.name} to ${firstSuccessProxy}&#96;);"

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyChain = \n\n [chainConfigData, onUpdateChain]);\n\n  // 定时更新延迟数据\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (!proxies?.records) return;\n\n    const updateDelays = () =\u003e {\n      const currentChain = proxyChainRef.current;\n      if (currentChain.length === 0) return;\n\n      const updatedChain = currentChain.map((item) =\u003e {\n        const proxyRecord = proxies.records[item.name];\n        if (\n          proxyRecord \u0026\u0026\n          proxyRecord.history \u0026\u0026\n          proxyRecord.history.length \u003e 0\n        ) {\n          const latestDelay =\n            proxyRecord.history[proxyRecord.history.length - 1].delay;\n          return { ...item, delay: latestDelay };\n        }\n        return item;\n      });\n\n      // 只有在延迟数据确实发生变化时才更新\n      const hasChanged = updatedChain.some(\n        (item, index) =\u003e item.delay !== currentChain[index]?.delay,\n      );\n\n      if (hasChanged) {\n        onUpdateChainRef.current(updatedChain);\n      }\n    };\n\n    // 立即更新一次延迟\n    updateDelays();\n\n    // 设置定时器，每5秒更新一次延迟\n    const interval = setInterval(updateDelays, 5000);\n\n    return () =\u003e clearInterval(interval);\n  }, [proxies?.records]); // 只依赖proxies.records\n\n  return (\n    \u003cPaper\n      elevation={1}\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const CACHE_TTL = 30 * 60 * 1000;\n\nclass DelayManager {\n  private cache = new Map\u003cstring, DelayUpdate\u003e();\n  private urlMap = new Map\u003cstring, string\u003e();\n\n  // 每个节点的监听\n  private listenerMap = new Map\u003cstring, (update: DelayUpdate) =\u003e void\u003e();\n\n  // 每个分组的监听\n  private groupListenerMap = new Map\u003cstring, () =\u003e void\u003e();\n\n  private pendingItemUpdates = new Map\u003cstring, DelayUpdate[]\u003e();\n  private pendingGroupUpdates = new Set\u003cstring\u003e();\n  private itemFlushScheduled = false;\n  private groupFlushScheduled = false;\n\n  private scheduleItemFlush() {\n    if (this.itemFlushScheduled) return;\n    this.itemFlushScheduled = true;\n\n    const run = () =\u003e {\n      this.itemFlushScheduled = false;\n      const updates = this.pendingItemUpdates;\n      this.pendingItemUpdates = new Map();\n\n      updates.forEach((queue, key) =\u003e {\n        const listener = this.listenerMap.get(key);\n        if (!listener) return;\n\n        queue.forEach((update) =\u003e {\n          try {\n            listener(update);\n          } catch (error) {\n            console.error(\n              &#96;[DelayManager] 通知节点延迟监听器失败: ${key}&#96;,\n              error,\n            );\n          }\n        });\n      });\n    };\n\n    if (typeof window !== \"undefined\") {\n      if (typeof window.requestAnimationFrame === \"function\") {\n        window.requestAnimationFrame(run);\n        return;\n      }\n      if (typeof window.setTimeout === \"function\") {\n        window.setTimeout(run, 0);\n        return;\n      }\n    }\n\n    Promise.resolve().then(run);\n  }\n\n  private scheduleGroupFlush() {\n    if (this.groupFlushScheduled) return;\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n\n  // 延迟测试\n  const handleCheckDelay = useLockFn(async () =\u003e {\n    const groupName = state.selection.group;\n    if (!groupName || isDirectMode) return;\n\n    debugLog(&#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 开始测试所有延迟，组: ${groupName}&#96;);\n\n    const timeout = verge?.default_latency_timeout || 10000;\n\n    // 获取当前组的所有代理\n    const proxyNames: string[] = [];\n    const providers: Set\u003cstring\u003e = new Set();\n\n    if (isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 proxies?.global) {\n      // 全局模式\n      const allProxies = proxies.global.all\n        .filter((p: any) =\u003e {\n          const name = typeof p === \"string\" ? p : p.name;\n          return name !== \"DIRECT\" \u0026\u0026 name !== \"REJECT\";\n        })\n        .map((p: any) =\u003e (typeof p === \"string\" ? p : p.name));\n\n      allProxies.forEach((name: string) =\u003e {\n        const proxy = state.proxyData.records[name];\n        if (proxy?.provider) {\n          providers.add(proxy.provider);\n        } else {\n          proxyNames.push(name);\n        }\n      });\n    } else {\n      // 规则模式\n      const group = state.proxyData.groups.find((g) =\u003e g.name === groupName);\n      if (group) {\n        group.all.forEach((name: string) =\u003e {\n          const proxy = state.proxyData.records[name];\n          if (proxy?.provider) {\n            providers.add(proxy.provider);\n          } else {\n            proxyNames.push(name);\n          }\n        });\n      }\n    }\n\n    debugLog(\n      &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 找到代理数量: ${proxyNames.length}, 提供者数量: ${providers.size}&#96;,\n    );\n\n    // 测试提供者的节点\n    if (providers.size \u003e 0) {\n      debugLog(&#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 开始测试提供者节点&#96;);\n      await Promise.allSettled(\n        [...providers].map((p) =\u003e healthcheckProxyProvider(p)),\n      );\n    }\n\n    // 测试非提供者的节点\n    if (proxyNames.length \u003e 0)\n  };\n;",

        "contents": "// 多列布局\nexport const ProxyItemMini = (props: Props) =\u003e {\n  const { group, proxy, selected, showType = true, onClick } = props;\n\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n\n  const presetList = [\"DIRECT\", \"REJECT\", \"REJECT-DROP\", \"PASS\", \"COMPATIBLE\"];\n  const isPreset = presetList.includes(proxy.name);\n  // -1/\u003c=0 为不显示，-2 为 loading\n  const [delayState, setDelayState] = useReducer(\n    (_: DelayUpdate, next: DelayUpdate) =\u003e next,\n    { delay: -1, updatedAt: 0 },\n  );\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n  const timeout = verge?.default_latency_timeout || 10000;\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isPreset) return;\n    delayManager.setListener(proxy.name, group.name, setDelayState);\n\n    return () =\u003e {\n      delayManager.removeListener(proxy.name, group.name);\n    };\n  }, [isPreset, proxy.name, group.name]);\n\n  const updateDelay = useCallback(() =\u003e {\n    if (!proxy) return;\n    const cachedUpdate = delayManager.getDelayUpdate(proxy.name, group.name);\n    if (cachedUpdate) {\n      setDelayState({ ...cachedUpdate });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const fallbackDelay = delayManager.getDelayFix(proxy, group.name);\n    if (fallbackDelay === -1) {\n      setDelayState({ delay: -1, updatedAt: 0 });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    let updatedAt = 0;\n    const history = proxy.history;\n    if (history \u0026\u0026 history.length \u003e 0) {\n      const lastRecord = history[history.length - 1];\n      const parsed = Date.parse(lastRecord.time);\n      if (!Number.isNaN(parsed)) {\n        updatedAt = parsed;\n      }\n    }\n\n    setDelayState({\n      delay: fallbackDelay,\n      updatedAt,\n    });\n  }, [proxy, group.name]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    updateDelay();\n  }, [updateDelay]);\n\n  const onDelay = useLockFn(async () =\u003e {\n    setDelayState({ delay: -2, updatedAt: Date.now() });\n    setDelayState(\n      await delayManager.checkDelay(proxy.name, group.name, timeout),\n    );\n  });\n\n  const delayValue = delayState.delay;\n\n  return\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \nconst proxyOptions = (() =\u003e {\n    const sortWithLatency = (proxiesToSort: ProxyOption[]) =\u003e {\n      if (!proxiesToSort || sortType === 0) return proxiesToSort;\n\n      if (!state.proxyData.records || !state.selection.group) {\n        return proxiesToSort;\n      }\n\n      const list = [...proxiesToSort];\n\n      if (sortType === 1) {\n        const refreshTick = delaySortRefresh;\n        const effectiveTimeout =\n          typeof defaultLatencyTimeout === \"number\" \u0026\u0026 defaultLatencyTimeout \u003e 0\n            ? defaultLatencyTimeout\n            : 10000;\n\n        const categorizeDelay = (delay: number): [number, number] =\u003e {\n          if (!Number.isFinite(delay)) return [5, Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER];\n          if (delay \u003e 1e5) return [4, delay];\n          if (delay === 0 || (delay \u003e= effectiveTimeout \u0026\u0026 delay \u003c= 1e5)) {\n            return [3, delay || effectiveTimeout];\n          }\n          if (delay \u003c 0) return [5, Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER];\n          return [0, delay];\n        };\n\n        list.sort((a, b) =\u003e {\n          const recordA = state.proxyData.records[a.name];\n          const recordB = state.proxyData.records[b.name];\n\n          const [ar, av] = recordA\n            ? categorizeDelay(\n                delayManager.getDelayFix(recordA, state.selection.group),\n              )\n            : [6, Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER];\n          const [br, bv] = recordB\n            ? categorizeDelay(\n                delayManager.getDelayFix(recordB, state.selection.group),\n              )\n            : [6, Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER];\n\n          if (ar !== br) return ar - br;\n          if (av !== bv) return av - bv;\n          return refreshTick \u003e= 0 ? a.name.localeCompare(b.name) : 0;\n        });\n      } else {\n        list.sort((a, b) =\u003e a.name.localeCompare(b.name));\n      }\n\n      return list;\n    };\n\n    if (isDirectMode) {\n      return [{ name: \"DIRECT\" }];\n    }\n    if (isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 proxies?.global) {\n      const options = proxies.global.all\n        .filter\n\n;\n  }\n;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyItem = \n() =\u003e {\n\n  }, [proxy.name, group.name, isPreset]);\n\n  const updateDelay = useCallback(() =\u003e {\n    if (!proxy) return;\n    const cachedUpdate = delayManager.getDelayUpdate(proxy.name, group.name);\n    if (cachedUpdate) {\n      setDelayState({ ...cachedUpdate });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const fallbackDelay = delayManager.getDelayFix(proxy, group.name);\n    if (fallbackDelay === -1) {\n      setDelayState({ delay: -1, updatedAt: 0 });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    let updatedAt = 0;\n    const history = proxy.history;\n    if (history \u0026\u0026 history.length \u003e 0) {\n      const lastRecord = history[history.length - 1];\n      const parsed = Date.parse(lastRecord.time);\n      if (!Number.isNaN(parsed)) {\n        updatedAt = parsed;\n      }\n    }\n\n    setDelayState({\n      delay: fallbackDelay,\n      updatedAt,\n    });\n  }, [proxy, group.name]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    updateDelay();\n  }, [updateDelay]);\n\n  const onDelay = useLockFn(async () =\u003e {\n    setDelayState({ delay: -2, updatedAt: Date.now() });\n    setDelayState(\n      await delayManager.checkDelay(proxy.name, group.name, timeout),\n    );\n  });\n\n  const delayValue = delayState.delay;\n\n  return\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "// 代理选择 Hook\nexport const useProxySelection = (options: ProxySelectionOptions = {}) =\u003e {\n  const { current, patchCurrent } = useProfiles();\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n\n  const { onSuccess, onError, enableConnectionCleanup = true } = options;\n\n  // 缓存\n  const config = useMemo(\n    () =\u003e ({\n      autoCloseConnection: verge?.auto_close_connection ?? false,\n      enableConnectionCleanup,\n    }),\n    [verge?.auto_close_connection, enableConnectionCleanup],\n  );\n\n  // 切换节点\n  const changeProxy = useLockFn(\n    async (\n      groupName: string,\n      proxyName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e {\n      debugLog(&#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;);\n\n      try {\n        if (current \u0026\u0026 !skipConfigSave) {\n          const selected = current.selected ? [...current.selected] : [];\n          const index = selected.findIndex((item) =\u003e item.name === groupName);\n\n          if (index \u003c 0) {\n            selected.push({ name: groupName, now: proxyName });\n          } else {\n            selected[index] = { name: groupName, now: proxyName };\n          }\n          await patchCurrent({ selected });\n        }\n\n        await selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName);\n        await syncTrayProxySelection();\n        debugLog(\n          &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理和状态同步完成: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n        );\n\n        onSuccess?.();\n\n        if (\n          config.enableConnectionCleanup \u0026\u0026\n          config.autoCloseConnection \u0026\u0026\n          previousProxy\n        ) {\n          setTimeout(() =\u003e cleanupConnections(previousProxy), 0);\n        }\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\n          &#96;\n\n    }\n;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class DelayManager {\n\n\n  async checkDelay(\n    name: string,\n    group: string,\n    timeout: number,\n  ): Promise\u003cDelayUpdate\u003e {\n    debugLog(\n      &#96;[DelayManager] 开始测试延迟，代理: ${name}, 组: ${group}, 超时: ${timeout}ms&#96;,\n    );\n\n    // 先将状态设置为测试中\n    this.setDelay(name, group, -2);\n\n    let delay = -1;\n    let elapsed = 0;\n\n    const startTime = Date.now();\n\n    try {\n      const url = this.getUrl(group);\n      debugLog(&#96;[DelayManager] 调用API测试延迟，代理: ${name}, URL: ${url}&#96;);\n\n      // 设置超时处理, delay = 0 为超时\n      const timeoutPromise = new Promise\u003cProxyDelay\u003e((resolve) =\u003e {\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e resolve({ delay: 0 }), timeout);\n      });\n\n      // 使用Promise.race来实现超时控制\n      const result = await Promise.race([\n        delayProxyByName(name, url, timeout),\n        timeoutPromise,\n      ]);\n\n      const elapsedTime = Date.now() - startTime;\n\n      delay = result.delay;\n      elapsed = elapsedTime;\n      debugLog(&#96;[DelayManager] 延迟测试完成，代理: ${name}, 结果: ${delay}ms&#96;);\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(&#96;[DelayManager] 延迟测试出错，代理: ${name}&#96;, error);\n      delay = 1e6; // error\n      elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;\n    }\n\n    return this.setDelay(name, group, delay, { elapsed });\n  }\n\n  async checkListDelay(\n    nameList: string[],\n    group: string,\n    timeout: number,\n    concurrency = 36,\n  ) {\n    \n  }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const ProfilePage = \nconst activateProfile = \nasync (profile: string, notifySuccess: boolean) =\u003e {\n(prev) =\u003e {\n\n        return [...prev, profile];\n      });\n\n      try {\n        debugLog(\n          &#96;[Profile] 开始切换到: ${profile}，序列号: ${currentSequence}&#96;,\n        );\n\n        // 检查请求有效性\n        if (\n          isRequestOutdated(currentSequence, requestSequenceRef, profile) ||\n          isOperationAborted(currentAbortController, profile)\n        ) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        // 执行切换请求\n        const requestPromise = patchProfiles(\n          { current: profile },\n          currentAbortController.signal,\n        );\n        pendingRequestRef.current = requestPromise;\n\n        const success = await requestPromise;\n\n        if (pendingRequestRef.current === requestPromise) {\n          pendingRequestRef.current = null;\n        }\n\n        // 再次检查有效性\n        if (\n          isRequestOutdated(currentSequence, requestSequenceRef, profile) ||\n          isOperationAborted(currentAbortController, profile)\n        ) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        // 完成切换\n        await mutateLogs();\n        closeAllConnections();\n\n        if (notifySuccess \u0026\u0026 success) {\n          showNotice.success(\n            \"profiles.page.feedback.notifications.profileSwitched\",\n            1000,\n          );\n        }\n\n        debugLog(\n          &#96;[Profile] 切换到 ${profile} 完成，序列号: ${currentSequence}，开始后台处理&#96;,\n        );\n\n        // 延迟执行后台任务\n        setTimeout(\n          () =\u003e\n            executeBackgroundTasks(\n              profile,\n              currentSequence,\n              currentAbortController,\n            ),\n          50,\n        );\n      } catch (err: any) {\n        if (pendingRequestRef.current) {\n          pendingRequestRef.current = null;\n        }\n    }\n;\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "use crate::{\n    cmd,\n    config::{Config, PrfItem, PrfOption, profiles::profiles_draft_update_item_safe},\n    core::{CoreManager, handle, tray},\n};\nuse anyhow::{Result, bail};\nuse clash_verge_logging::{Type, logging, logging_error};\nuse smartstring::alias::String;\nuse tauri::Emitter as _;\n\n/// Toggle proxy profile\npub async fn toggle_proxy_profile(profile_index: String) {\n    logging_error!(\n        Type::Config,\n        cmd::patch_profiles_config_by_profile_index(profile_index).await\n    );\n}\n\npub async fn switch_proxy_node(group_name: \u0026str, proxy_name: \u0026str) {\n    match handle::Handle::mihomo()\n        .await\n        .select_node_for_group(group_name, proxy_name)\n        .await\n    {\n        Ok(_) =\u003e {\n            logging!(info, Type::Tray, \"切换代理成功: {} -\u003e {}\", group_name, proxy_name);\n            let _ = handle::Handle::app_handle().emit(\"verge://refresh-proxy-config\", ());\n            let _ = tray::Tray::global().update_menu().await;\n            return;\n        }\n        Err(err) =\u003e {\n            logging!(\n                error,\n                Type::Tray,\n                \"切换代理失败: {} -\u003e {}, 错误: {:?}\",\n                group_name,\n                proxy_name,\n                err\n            );\n        }\n    }\n\n    match handle::Handle::mihomo()\n        .await\n        .select_node_for_group(group_name, proxy_name)\n        .await\n    {\n        Ok(_) =\u003e {\n            logging!(info, Type::Tray, \"代理切换回退成功: {} -\u003e {}\", group_name, proxy_name);\n            let _ = tray::Tray::global().update_menu().await;\n        }\n        Err(err) =\u003e {\n            logging!(\n                error,\n                Type::Tray,\n                \"代理切换最终失败: {} -\u003e {}, 错误: {:?}\",\n                group_name,\n                proxy_name,\n                err\n            );\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nasync fn should_update_profile",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const useFallbackSwitchNotify = \n() =\u003e {\n\n    \n    for (const [groupName, currentNow] of currentGroups) {\n      const previousNow = previousGroups.get(groupName);\n      \n      // 检测到节点切换\n      if (previousNow \u0026\u0026 previousNow !== currentNow) {\n        debugLog(\n          &#96;[FallbackNotify] Detected switch in group ${groupName}: ${previousNow} -\u003e ${currentNow}&#96;\n        );\n        \n        // 检查是否在冷却期内\n        const cooldownStatus = isInNotifyCooldown();\n        if (cooldownStatus.inCooldown) {\n          debugLog(\n            &#96;[FallbackNotify] Skipping notification (${cooldownStatus.reason}, ${cooldownStatus.elapsed}ms elapsed)&#96;\n          );\n        } else {\n          // 发送 fallback 切换通知\n          invoke(\"notify_fallback_proxy_switched\", {\n            group: groupName,\n            from: previousNow,\n            to: currentNow,\n          })\n            .then(() =\u003e {\n              debugLog(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Notification sent for group ${groupName}&#96;);\n            })\n            .catch((error) =\u003e {\n              console.error(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Failed to send notification:&#96;, error);\n            });\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 更新保存的状态\n    previousGroupsRef.current = currentGroups;\n  }, [proxiesData?.groups]);\n};",

        "contents": "removeGroupListener(group: string) {\n\n  }\n\n  setDelay(\n    name: string,\n    group: string,\n    delay: number,\n    meta?: { elapsed?: number },\n  ): DelayUpdate {\n    const key = hashKey(name, group);\n    debugLog(\n      &#96;[DelayManager] 设置延迟，代理: ${name}, 组: ${group}, 延迟: ${delay}&#96;,\n    );\n    const update: DelayUpdate = {\n      delay,\n      elapsed: meta?.elapsed,\n      updatedAt: Date.now(),\n    };\n\n    this.cache.set(key, update);\n\n    const queue = this.pendingItemUpdates.get(key);\n    if (queue) {\n      queue.push(update);\n    } else {\n      this.pendingItemUpdates.set(key, [update]);\n    }\n    this.scheduleItemFlush();\n\n    return update;\n  }\n\n  getDelayUpdate(name: string, group: string) {\n    const key = hashKey(name, group);\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyGroups = \n\n\n  // 处理代理组选择菜单\n  const handleGroupMenuOpen = (event: React.MouseEvent\u003cHTMLElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n    setRuleMenuAnchor(event.currentTarget);\n  };\n\n  const handleGroupMenuClose = () =\u003e {\n    setRuleMenuAnchor(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleGroupSelect = (groupName: string) =\u003e {\n    setSelectedGroup(groupName);\n    handleGroupMenuClose();\n\n    if (isChainMode \u0026\u0026 mode === \"rule\") {\n      updateProxyChainConfigInRuntime(null);\n      localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-group\");\n      localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-exit-node\");\n      localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-items\");\n      setProxyChain([]);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleChangeProxy = useCallback(\n    (group: IProxyGroupItem, proxy: IProxyItem) =\u003e {\n      if (isChainMode) {\n        // 使用函数式更新来避免状态延迟问题\n        setProxyChain((prev) =\u003e {\n          // 检查是否已经存在相同名称的代理，防止重复添加\n          if (prev.some((item) =\u003e item.name === proxy.name)) {\n            const warningMessage = t(\"proxies.page.chain.duplicateNode\");\n            setDuplicateWarning({\n              open: true,\n              message: warningMessage,\n            });\n            return prev; // 返回原来的状态，不做任何更改\n          }\n\n          // 安全获取延迟数据，如果没有延迟数据则设为 undefined\n          const delay =\n            proxy.history \u0026\u0026 proxy.history.length \u003e 0\n              ? proxy.history[proxy.history.length - 1].delay\n              : undefined;\n\n          const chainItem: ProxyChainItem = {\n            id: &#96;${proxy.name}_${Date.now()}&#96;,\n            name: proxy.name,\n            type: proxy.type,\n            delay: delay,\n          };\n\n          return [...prev, chainItem];\n        });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (![\"Selector\", \"URLTest\", \"Fallback\"].includes(group.type)) return;\n\n      handleProxyGroupChange(group, proxy);\n    },\n    [handleProxyGroupChange, isChainMode, t],\n  );\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class DelayManager {\n\n\n  /// 暂时修复provider的节点延迟排序的问题\n  getDelayFix(proxy: IProxyItem, group: string) {\n    if (!proxy.provider) {\n      const update = this.getDelayUpdate(proxy.name, group);\n      if (update \u0026\u0026 (update.delay \u003e= 0 || update.delay === -2)) {\n        return update.delay;\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 添加 history 属性的安全检查\n    if (proxy.history \u0026\u0026 proxy.history.length \u003e 0) {\n      // 0ms以error显示\n      return proxy.history[proxy.history.length - 1].delay || 1e6;\n    }\n    return -1;\n  }\n\n  async checkDelay(\n    name: string,\n    group: string,\n    timeout: number,\n  ): Promise\u003cDelayUpdate\u003e {\n    \n  }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "class DelayManager {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193
          },

            "lineNumber": 194

          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "  getDelayFix(proxy: IProxyItem, group: string) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "    if (!proxy.provider) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "      const update = this.getDelayUpdate(proxy.name, group);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "      if (update \u0026\u0026 (update.delay \u003e= 0 || update.delay === -2)) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "        return update.delay;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "    // 添加 history 属性的安全检查"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "    if (proxy.history \u0026\u0026 proxy.history.length \u003e 0) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "      // 0ms以error显示"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "      return proxy.history[proxy.history.length - 1].delay || 1e6;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {

            "text": "    return -1;"

        "contents": "//go:linkname temporaryUpdateGeneral github.com/metacubex/mihomo/config.temporaryUpdateGeneral\nfunc temporaryUpdateGeneral(general *config.General) func() {\n\toldGeneral := GetGeneral()\n\tupdateGeneral(general, false)\n\treturn func() {\n\t\tupdateGeneral(oldGeneral, false)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc updateGeneral(general *config.General, logging bool) {\n\ttunnel.SetMode(general.Mode)\n\ttunnel.SetFindProcessMode(general.FindProcessMode)\n\tresolver.DisableIPv6 = !general.IPv6\n\n\tdialer.SetTcpConcurrent(general.TCPConcurrent)\n\tif logging \u0026\u0026 general.TCPConcurrent {\n\t\tlog.Infoln(\"Use tcp concurrent\")\n\t}\n\n\tinbound.SetTfo(general.InboundTfo)\n\tinbound.SetMPTCP(general.InboundMPTCP)\n\n\tkeepalive.SetKeepAliveIdle(time.Duration(general.KeepAliveIdle) * time.Second)\n\tkeepalive.SetKeepAliveInterval(time.Duration(general.KeepAliveInterval) * time.Second)\n\tkeepalive.SetDisableKeepAlive(general.DisableKeepAlive)\n\n\tadapter.UnifiedDelay.Store(general.UnifiedDelay)\n\n\tdialer.DefaultInterface.Store(general.Interface)\n\tdialer.DefaultRoutingMark.Store(int32(general.RoutingMark))\n\tif logging \u0026\u0026 general.RoutingMark \u003e 0 {\n\t\tlog.Infoln(\"Use routing mark: %#x\", general.RoutingMark)\n\t}\n\n\tiface.FlushCache()\n\n\tgeodata.SetGeodataMode(general.GeodataMode)\n\tgeodata.SetLoader(general.GeodataLoader)\n\tgeodata.SetSiteMatcher(general.GeositeMatcher)\n\tgeodata.SetGeoIpUrl(general.GeoXUrl.GeoIp)\n\tgeodata.SetGeoSiteUrl(general.GeoXUrl.GeoSite)\n\tgeodata.SetMmdbUrl(general.GeoXUrl.Mmdb)\n\tgeodata.SetASNUrl(general.GeoXUrl.ASN)\n\tmihomoHttp.SetUA(general.GlobalUA)\n\tresource.SetETag(general.ETagSupport)\n\n\tif general.GlobalClientFingerprint != \"\" {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"The &#96;global-client-fingerprint&#96; configuration is deprecated, please set &#96;client-fingerprint&#96; directly on the proxy instead\")\n\t}\n\ttlsC.SetGlobalFingerprint(general.GlobalClientFingerprint)\n}\n\nfunc updateUsers(users []auth.AuthUser)",

        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isDirectMode) return;\n    if (!autoDelayEnabled) return;\n    if (!state.selection.group || !state.selection.proxy) return;\n\n    let disposed = false;\n    let intervalTimer: ReturnType\u003ctypeof setTimeout\u003e | null = null;\n    let initialTimer: ReturnType\u003ctypeof setTimeout\u003e | null = null;\n\n    const runAndSchedule = async () =\u003e {\n      if (disposed) return;\n      await checkCurrentProxyDelay();\n      if (disposed) return;\n      intervalTimer = setTimeout(runAndSchedule, autoDelayIntervalMs);\n    };\n\n    initialTimer = setTimeout(async () =\u003e {\n      await checkCurrentProxyDelay();\n      if (disposed) return;\n      intervalTimer = setTimeout(runAndSchedule, autoDelayIntervalMs);\n    }, AUTO_CHECK_INITIAL_DELAY_MS);\n\n    return () =\u003e {\n      disposed = true;\n      if (initialTimer) clearTimeout(initialTimer);\n      if (intervalTimer) clearTimeout(intervalTimer);\n    };\n  }, [\n    checkCurrentProxyDelay,\n    autoDelayIntervalMs,\n    isDirectMode,\n    state.selection.group,\n    state.selection.proxy,\n    autoDelayEnabled,\n  ]);\n\n  // 自定义渲染选择框中的值\n  const renderProxyValue = (selected: string) =\u003e {\n    if (!selected || !state.proxyData.records[selected]) return selected;\n\n    const delayValue = delayManager.getDelayFix(\n      state.proxyData.records[selected],\n      state.selection.group,\n    );\n\n    return (\n      \u003cBox sx={{ display: \"flex\", justifyContent: \"space-between\" }}\u003e\n        \u003cTypography noWrap\u003e{selected}\u003c/Typography\u003e\n        \u003cChip\n          size=\"small\"\n          label={delayManager.formatDelay(delayValue)}\n          color={convertDelayColor(delayValue)}\n        /\u003e\n      \u003c/Box\u003e\n    );\n  };\n\n  // 排序类型变更\n  const handleSortTypeChange = useCallback(() =\u003e {\n    const newSortType = ((sortType + 1) % 3) as ProxySortType;\n    setSortType(newSortType);\n    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY_SORT_TYPE, newSortType.toString());\n  }, [sortType]);\n\n  // 延迟测试\n  const handleCheckDelay = useLockFn\n;\n;",

        "contents": "func getProxyDelay(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tquery := r.URL.Query()\n\turl := query.Get(\"url\")\n\ttimeout, err := strconv.ParseInt(query.Get(\"timeout\"), 10, 16)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrBadRequest)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\texpectedStatus, err := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](query.Get(\"expected\"))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrBadRequest)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tproxy := r.Context().Value(CtxKeyProxy).(C.Proxy)\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(timeout))\n\tdefer cancel()\n\n\tdelay, err := proxy.URLTest(ctx, url, expectedStatus)\n\tif ctx.Err() != nil {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusGatewayTimeout)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrRequestTimeout)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif err != nil || delay == 0 {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusServiceUnavailable)\n\t\tif err != nil \u0026\u0026 delay != 0 {\n\t\t\trender.JSON(w, r, err)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\trender.JSON(w, r, newError(\"An error occurred in the delay test\"))\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\trender.JSON(w, r, render.M{\n\t\t\"delay\": delay,\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc unfixedProxy(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tproxy := r.Context().Value(CtxKeyProxy).(C.Proxy)\n\tif selectAble, ok := proxy.Adapter().(outboundgroup.SelectAble); ok \u0026\u0026 proxy.Type() != C.Selector {\n\t\tselectAble.ForceSet(\"\")\n\t\tcachefile.Cache().SetSelected(proxy.Name(), \"\")\n\t\trender.NoContent(w, r)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\trender.Status(r, http.StatusBadRequest)\n\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrBadRequest)\n}\n\n// proxiesWithProviders merges all proxies from tunnel\n//\n// Deprecated: This function is poorly implemented and should not be called by any new code.\n// It is left here only to ensure the compatibility of the output of the existing RESTful API.\nfunc proxiesWithProviders() map[string]C.Proxy {\n\tallProxies := make(map[string]C.Proxy)",

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

Now I see the flow clearly:

1. When user **clicks a node** (Request.Select): ProxyActivity calls `patchSelector(names[it.index], it.name)` and updates `states[it.index].now = it.name`, then calls `design.requestRedrawVisible()`.

2. **The problem**: When Select is triggered, the code does NOT send `ProxyDesign.Request.Reload(it.index)`. So the proxy list (including delay values) is NOT re-fetched from the core. Only the local state `now` is updated and the UI is redrawn. The delay values in the Proxy objects are whatever was last loaded when Reload was called - they don't get updated from the core.

3. When user does **UrlTest**: It calls `healthCheck(names[it.index])` and then sends `design.requests.send(ProxyDesign.Request.Reload(it.index))` - so it reloads the group and gets fresh delay data.

So the fix should be: when the user selects a node (Request.Select), after patchSelector we should also trigger a Reload for that group so that the UI gets fresh proxy data including updated delays from the core. Or the core might update delays asynchronously - we need to check if the native core updates delay after selector change.

I will check the native (Go) side - when we patch selector, does the core update the delay cache? And when we query group, where does delay come from?
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

Now I understand the full picture:

1. **Go core**: `convertProxies` gets delay from `p.LastDelayForTestUrl(testURL)` - so delay comes from the core's cached delay history. When user switches node (PatchSelector), the core updates the selection but does NOT re-run delay tests. The delay values in the core are whatever was last measured (e.g. from URLTest group's periodic tests, or from a manual health check).

2. **Android**: When user clicks a node (Request.Select), ProxyActivity only:
   - Calls patchSelector (updates core selection)
   - Updates state.now locally
   - Calls requestRedrawVisible()

   It does NOT send Reload for that group. So the UI keeps showing the same Proxy list (same Proxy objects with same delay values) that was loaded the last time Reload was called. The core might have updated delays in the background (e.g. URLTest groups) but we're not re-querying.

So there are two aspects:

**A) If the core's delay values do get updated (e.g. URLTest group runs periodically)**  
Then the fix is: after Select, send Reload for that index so we re-query the group and get fresh delay data from the core.

**B) If the core doesn't update delays when we just switch node**  
Then the delay shown is "last measured" - it wouldn't change until a health check or URLTest runs. In that case we'd need either to trigger a health check on the group after switch, or at least reload so we show whatever the core has.

The user said "节点上的延迟数据并不会更新" - the delay on the nodes doesn't update. So when they switch node, they expect to see updated delays. The most likely fix is: **after selecting a node, trigger a Reload for that group** so the UI re-queries queryGroup and gets fresh Proxy list (including current delay values from the core). If the core updates delays asynchronously (e.g. URLTest), then the next Reload would show them; if not, at least we're consistent.

I will implement: when handling Request.Select, after patchSelector and updating state, also send Request.Reload(it.index) so the group is re-fetched and the list (including delays) is updated.
</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_


修改已经按你的需求加上了，原因和改动如下。

**原因说明**

1. **延迟数据从哪来**  
   节点列表和每个节点的 `delay` 都来自 core（Go）的 `queryGroup`。Go 里 `convertProxies` 用 `p.LastDelayForTestUrl(testURL)` 得到每个节点的延迟，也就是 core 里当前缓存的延迟。

2. **切换节点时原来做了什么**  
   点击节点时，`ProxyActivity` 只做了三件事：  
   - `patchSelector` 更新 core 里当前选中的节点  
   - 本地更新 `states[it.index].now = it.name`  
   - `design.requestRedrawVisible()` 触发重绘  

   没有再次向 core 请求该组的代理列表，所以界面一直用的是**上一次 Reload 时拿到的 `Proxy` 列表**，上面的 `delay` 不会变。

3. **为什么延迟不更新**  
   界面上的延迟来自 `ProxyViewState` 里的 `proxy.delay`，而 `proxy` 是上次 `updateGroup` 时传进来的。切换节点没有触发新的 `queryGroup` + `updateGroup`，所以列表和延迟都不会刷新。

**修改做法**

在处理 `Request.Select` 时，在原有逻辑之后增加一次「对该组重新拉取并更新 UI」：

- 用现有的 `reloadLock` 在后台再调一次 `queryProxyGroup(names[it.index], uiStore.proxySort)`。
- 用返回的 `group` 调用 `design.updateGroup(...)`，把该组的 `group.proxies`（含 core 当前延迟）和 `group.now` 更新到界面。

这样在点击切换节点后，该组的节点列表和延迟会从 core 重新取一次并刷新显示。若 core 里有 URLTest 等周期性测速，你也会在下次切换或 Reload 时看到更新后的延迟。

---

_**User**_

那是否会刷新整个 group？

---
